rulings.Case Title: JOANN YOUNG VS. RUBY LAI YOUNG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 24, 2014 line 7. DEFENDANT RUBY YOUNG's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based on termination of license. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the position that CC 1940.6 applies to licensees. Whether Defendant is a tenant is an issue of fact not properly raised on demurer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. TIMOTHY WILLIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, September 24, 2014 line 9. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY WILLIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Demurrer is based on an argument that DRS Management, not Tipton Management, is the property manager with capacity to sue. Complaint sufficiently and unambiguously alleges that Tipton Management is the property management, agent for the landlord, and DRS Management is the landlord. = (501/REQ)
